title: Da Lou Sword Sect
content:
Da Lou Sword Sect
 is the only sect on 
Planet Da Lou
. It was established by 
Ling Tianhou
.

This planet came from an illusionary planet that is always burning in the 
Brilliant Void Hell
. That illusionary planet was very large, thousands of times larger than planet Tian Yun! It was refined as a sword by 
Master Void Spirit
 of the 
Brilliant Void Cultivation Sect
. Due to an incident, the illusionary planet collapsed, and planet Da Lou is a fragment from the collapsed planet.
